module_info.docstring:
P1 Core Tests: File Reservation Lifecycle.

Complete test of file reservation from claim to release.

Test Cases:
1. Create exclusive reservation
2. Create shared reservation
3. Conflict detection: exclusive vs exclusive
4. Conflict detection: exclusive vs shared
5. No conflict: shared vs shared
6. Pattern overlap detection (src/** vs src/main.py)
7. TTL expiration releases reservation
8. Manual release before TTL
9. Stale detection (agent inactive)
10. Force release with notification
11. Renew reservation extends TTL

Verification:
- Git archive artifacts created (file_reservations/*.json)
- Conflicts returned with holder information
- Released reservations have released_ts set

Reference: mcp_agent_mail-aew

functions.name: get_file_reservation_from_db
functions.docstring: Get file reservation details from database.

functions.name: count_active_reservations
functions.docstring: Count active (non-released, non-expired) reservations in a project.

functions.name: get_project_id
functions.docstring: Get project ID from human_key.

functions.name: get_agent_id
functions.docstring: Get agent ID.

functions.name: setup_project_and_agent
functions.docstring: Create project and agent, return (project_key, agent_name).

functions.name: test_create_exclusive_reservation
functions.docstring: Create an exclusive file reservation.

functions.name: test_create_shared_reservation
functions.docstring: Create a shared (non-exclusive) file reservation.

functions.name: test_file_reservation_paths_batches_commits
functions.docstring: file_reservation_paths should emit a single commit per tool call.

functions.name: test_conflict_exclusive_vs_exclusive
functions.docstring: Exclusive reservation conflicts with another exclusive on same pattern.

functions.name: test_conflict_exclusive_vs_shared
functions.docstring: Exclusive reservation conflicts with existing shared on same pattern.

functions.name: test_no_conflict_shared_vs_shared
functions.docstring: Shared reservations do not conflict with each other.

functions.name: test_pattern_overlap_detection
functions.docstring: Pattern overlap is detected (src/** overlaps with src/main.py).

functions.name: test_pattern_overlap_reverse
functions.docstring: Reverse overlap: specific pattern first, then broad pattern.

functions.name: test_ttl_expiration_releases_reservation
functions.docstring: Reservation is effectively released after TTL expires.

functions.name: test_manual_release_before_ttl
functions.docstring: Reservation can be manually released before TTL expires.

functions.name: test_release_specific_paths
functions.docstring: Release only specific path patterns.

functions.name: test_renew_reservation_extends_ttl
functions.docstring: Renewing a reservation extends its TTL.

functions.name: test_renew_specific_reservation_by_id
functions.docstring: Renew a specific reservation by ID.

functions.name: test_force_release_stale_reservation
functions.docstring:
Force release a reservation held by an inactive agent.

Note: This test may skip if the reservation isn't considered stale
enough by the server's activity heuristics.

functions.name: test_same_agent_no_self_conflict
functions.docstring: Agent doesn't conflict with their own existing reservations.

functions.name: test_multiple_paths_single_request
functions.docstring: Reserve multiple paths in a single request.

functions.name: test_reservation_creates_git_artifact
functions.docstring:
File reservation creates artifact in Git archive.

Note: Verifies the reservation is properly stored; actual file write
depends on storage configuration.

functions.name: test_ttl_minimum_enforced
functions.docstring: TTL below minimum (60 seconds) is rejected or adjusted.
